      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int HUD_ACTIVE
      to activate and deactivate head-up display 抬头显示开关，HUD抬头显示，原ID为SETTING_FUNC_HUD_ACTIVE ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 17:58:37
      static int HUD_ANGLE
      HUD angle adjustment, original ID: SETTING_FUNC_HUD_ANGLE_TRANSMIT HUD 角度调节,原 ID 为 SETTING_FUNC_HUD_ANGLE_TRANSMIT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type 取值范围可通过 ICarConfig 获取 mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project hongqi at 2024-08-26 15:28:44
      static int HUD_ANGLE_ADJUST
      Request to adjust the HUD angle 激活HUD角度调节,原ID为SETTING_FUNC_HUD_ANGLE_ADJUST ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 18:05:24
      static int HUD_BRIGHTNESS
      HUD brightness adjustment, original ID: SETTING_FUNC_HUD_BRIGHTNESS_TRANSMIT.
      static int HUD_BRIGHTNESS_ADJUST
      Request to adjust the HUD brightness 激活HUD亮度调节,原ID为SETTING_FUNC_HUD_BRIGHTNESS_ADJUST ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 18:08:09
      static int HUD_DISPLAY_MODE
      Head-up display(HUD) display mode<br> 抬头显(HUD)显示模式<br> ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IHUD.HudDisplayMode property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 21:43:01
      static int HUD_DISPLAY_NAVI
      HUD display Navigation information HUD 显示导航信息设置，原ID为SETTING_FUNC_HUD_DISPLAY_NAVI ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 18:09:51

      Notify HUD to enter/exit AR HUD adjustment page.
      static int HUD_SNOW_MODE
